summary_en: 122,700 shares acquired for ¥126.0M via open market May 27-31, 2026. Cumulative progress: 122,700 shares (0.14% of issued S/O, 6.1% of ¥2.0B authorization limit). Authorized program: 2.0M shares (2.26% S/O) / ¥2.0B through Dec 31, 2026.
title_en: Notice Regarding Status of Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of treasury stock based on articles of incorporation under Company Law Article 165, Section 2)
translation_en_brief:
Axial Retailing Inc. reports the acquisition of 122,700 shares of common stock for a total of ¥126,025,500 via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between May 27 and May 31, 2026 (settlement basis).

The acquisition was executed under a board resolution passed on May 26, 2026, which authorized a program to acquire up to 2,000,000 shares (representing 2.26% of issued shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥2,000,000,000 over the period May 27, 2026 through December 31, 2026, via open-market purchase.

As of May 31, 2026, cumulative acquisition under this authorization stands at 122,700 shares for ¥126,025,500, representing 6.1% of the authorized share count and approximately 6.3% of the authorized yen limit.
